perturbation.original_text: 4. Verification of Data. No representation is made by Listing Broker as to the accuracy of the information and materials provided. Prospect and Prospect’s Broker agree to thoroughly review and in dependently verify the information and materials provided. Listing Broker advises Prospect and Prospect’s Broker to consult appropriate professionals for legal, tax, environmental, and other specialized advice concerning matters affecting th e Property and the transaction contemplated.
perturbation.changed_text: 4. Verification of Data. Listing Broker guarantees the accuracy of all data provided within a margin of error of +/- 5%. Prospect and Prospect’s Broker are still encouraged to review and independently verify the information and materials provided, but Listing Broker assumes liability for any inaccuracies exceeding the stated margin of error. Listing Broker advises Prospect and Prospect’s Broker to consult appropriate professionals for legal, tax, environmental, and other specialized advice concerning matters affecting th e Property and the transaction contemplated.
perturbation.explanation: The modified text directly contradicts the original by stating that the Listing Broker guarantees the accuracy of all data (within a margin of error), whereas the original text explicitly states that no representation is made regarding accuracy. This creates an in-text contradiction concerning the Listing Broker's responsibility for the accuracy of the provided information.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 4. Verification of Data. Listing Broker guarantees the accuracy of all data provided within a margin of error of +/- 5%. Prospect and Prospect’s Broker are still encouraged to review and independently verify the information and materials provided, but Listing Broker assumes liability for any inaccuracies exceeding the stated margin of error. Listing Broker advises Prospect and Prospect’s Broker to consult appropriate professionals for legal, tax, environmental, and other specialized advice concerning matters affecting th e Property and the transaction contemplated.
perturbation.justification: The changed text in Section 4 states that the Listing Broker 'guarantees the accuracy of all data provided within a margin of error of +/- 5%', directly contradicting the original text which states 'No representation is made by Listing Broker as to the accuracy of the information and materials provided'. The contradicted text is the changed text, which now enforces a direct contradiction with the original intent, creating a strong in-text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: 5. Disputes. This agreement will be construed in accordance with the laws of the State of Florida. The Listing Broker will be entitled to all remedies provided by law, including but not limited to injunc tive relief and damages. In any litigatio n arising out of this agreement, the prevailing party will be ent itled to recover from the non-prevailing party reasonable attorney’s fees, costs, and expenses.
perturbation.changed_text: 5. Disputes. This agreement will be construed in accordance with the laws of the State of Florida, except that all disputes must be resolved through binding arbitration in California. The Listing Broker will be entitled to all remedies provided by law, including but not limited to injunc tive relief and damages. In any litigatio n arising out of this agreement, each party will bear their own attorney’s fees, costs, and expenses, regardless of the outcome.
perturbation.explanation: The modified text creates a contradiction by mandating binding arbitration in California, conflicting with the initial statement that the agreement will be construed under Florida law. It also states that each party will bear its own legal fees, contradicting the earlier clause that awards fees to the prevailing party. This creates an in-text contradiction on which state's law is being applied, and who is responsible for the attorny fees.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 5. Disputes. This agreement will be construed in accordance with the laws of the State of Florida, except that all disputes must be resolved through binding arbitration in California. The Listing Broker will be entitled to all remedies provided by law, including but not limited to injunc tive relief and damages. In any litigatio n arising out of this agreement, each party will bear their own attorney’s fees, costs, and expenses, regardless of the outcome.
perturbation.justification: The changed text creates a direct contradiction with the original text by specifying that disputes must be resolved through binding arbitration in California, while the original text states that the agreement will be construed in accordance with the laws of the State of Florida. Additionally, the changed text stipulates that each party will bear their own attorney's fees, contradicting the original clause which awards fees to the prevailing party. The contradicted text is the same as the changed text, which introduces the contradiction within itself, and falls under the 'Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction' definition.

perturbation.original_text: 6. Term. This agreement will terminate ________________________ (i f blank, then 1 year) after the conclusion of any discussions or negotiations regardin g the above-referenced Property.
perturbation.changed_text: 6. Term. This agreement will terminate ________________________ (i f blank, then 1 year) after the conclusion of any discussions or negotiations regardin g the above-referenced Property. However, the confidentiality obligations outlined in section 1 shall survive indefinitely.
perturbation.explanation: The modified text introduces an in-text contradiction by stating that the agreement terminates after a specific period (or 1 year if blank), but the confidentiality obligations in section 1 survive indefinitely. This contradicts the clear termination clause and creates ambiguity about how long the confidentiality obligations truly last.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 6. Term. This agreement will terminate ________________________ (i f blank, then 1 year) after the conclusion of any discussions or negotiations regardin g the above-referenced Property. However, the confidentiality obligations outlined in section 1 shall survive indefinitely.
perturbation.justification: The changed text adds 'However, the confidentiality obligations outlined in section 1 shall survive indefinitely' to the original termination clause. This directly contradicts the original termination clause which states the agreement will terminate after a specific period (or 1 year if blank), creating a strong in-text contradiction as the confidentiality obligations are now indefinite, leading to confusion about the actual termination date of the entire agreement, specifically regarding the section 1 obligations. This aligns with the 'Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction' definition where different sections (the termination clause and the survival clause) provide conflicting deadlines or obligations.
